$description: xlOS visual identity tokens. Residual Frequencies design system, halide palette (technical cyan/blue, developer aesthetic). Sibling system: grok-install-v2 uses RF cinnabar (warm). Family cohesion is preserved through shared typography (Instrument Serif italic + IBM Plex Mono) and lab-plate structural grammar (registration crosses, frequency curves, monospace-forward type).

grid.$description: Plate grid wash (low alpha in use).

accent.$description: Halide cyan-blue — sole accent. Use sparingly.
